description: Detects malloc/calloc allocations without corresponding free in the same function. Simplified from Rust: flags all allocation call_expression nodes without tracking free() pairing, struct ownership transfer, or goto-cleanup patterns. Languages scoped to c only.

flag.message: Allocation call detected -- verify malloc(), calloc(), realloc(), strdup(), strndup(), asprintf(), reallocarray() have a corresponding free() in the same function to avoid memory leaks.
